title: Dream Server Environment Configuration
description: Schema for Dream Server .env file validation

DREAM_VERSION.description: Dream Server version for update compatibility checks

DREAM_MODE.description: LLM backend mode: local, cloud, hybrid, or lemonade (AMD)

LLM_API_URL.description: URL where all services send LLM requests

LLM_URL.description: LLM base URL used by dashboard-api functional diagnostics. Leave empty to follow LLM_API_URL inside the Docker network.

MODEL_PROFILE.description: Tier-aware local model family selection: qwen, gemma4, or auto

LLM_API_BASE_PATH.description: Base API path for the inference backend

DREAM_TALK_VISION_URL.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for Dream Talk image attachments. Accepts either a host root or a base path ending in /v1 or /api/v1.

DREAM_TALK_VISION_KEY.description: Optional bearer token for the Dream Talk vision backend.

DREAM_TALK_VISION_MODEL.description: Vision-capable model id used by Dream Talk image attachments.

AMD_INFERENCE_RUNTIME.description: Explicit AMD local inference runtime selected by the installer. Empty when AMD local inference is not active.

AMD_INFERENCE_BACKEND.description: Explicit AMD acceleration backend used by the selected local inference runtime.

AMD_INFERENCE_LOCATION.description: Where the selected AMD local inference runtime is running from the dashboard-api container's perspective.

AMD_INFERENCE_PORT.description: Port used by the selected AMD local inference runtime. Defaults to the Lemonade api_port from config/backends/amd.json.

AMD_INFERENCE_SUPPORTED_BACKENDS.description: Comma-separated AMD accelerator backends declared by the installer for the selected runtime, such as rocm, vulkan, or rocm,vulkan.

AMD_INFERENCE_RUNTIME_MODE.description: Installer-declared AMD runtime mode for diagnostics.

AMD_INFERENCE_MANAGED.description: Whether the selected AMD inference runtime is managed by DreamServer.

TARGET_API_KEY.description: API key for Privacy Shield upstream target (set to LITELLM_KEY in lemonade mode)

MINIMAX_API_KEY.description: MiniMax API key for MiniMax models (cloud/hybrid modes)

WEBUI_SECRET.description: Session signing secret for Open WebUI

LITELLM_LEMONADE_API_KEY.description: Outbound API key LiteLLM sends when calling the local Lemonade LLM backend (AMD installs only). Generated per-install at phase 06.

LEMONADE_EXTERNAL.description: True when Dream Server should wrap an existing Lemonade SDK service instead of starting its managed Lemonade runtime.

LEMONADE_BASE_URL.description: Host-side base URL for an existing Lemonade SDK service, without /v1 or /api/v1. Defaults to Lemonade's modern localhost service port.

LEMONADE_CONTAINER_BASE_URL.description: Container-side base URL for reaching the existing Lemonade SDK service, usually host.docker.internal with the Lemonade port.

LEMONADE_API_BASE_PATH.description: API path prefix for Lemonade OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Dream Server defaults to /api/v1 for Lemonade.

LEMONADE_MODEL.description: Model id to request from an existing Lemonade SDK service. Leave empty on managed DreamServer Lemonade installs, where GGUF_FILE is mapped to extra.<GGUF_FILE>.

OPENCLAW_DANGEROUSLY_DISABLE_DEVICE_AUTH.description: Dangerous escape hatch that disables OpenClaw device pairing. Leave empty unless you fully accept unauthenticated LAN/Tailscale agent access risk.

BIND_ADDRESS.description: IP address for Docker port bindings. 127.0.0.1 (default) for localhost-only access. 0.0.0.0 for LAN access on headless servers. See SECURITY.md.

HOST_LAN_IP.description: Host machine's LAN IP, written by the installer when BIND_ADDRESS=0.0.0.0 so containers can announce the LAN address (e.g., openclaw allowedOrigins). Empty when binding only to localhost.

MAX_CONTEXT.description: Context window (installer variable, maps to CTX_SIZE)

GPU_BACKEND.description: GPU backend: nvidia, amd, apple, or cpu

N_GPU_LAYERS.description: Number of model layers to offload to GPU

LLAMA_BATCH_SIZE.description: llama.cpp prompt processing batch size. Higher values can improve prefill throughput but use more memory.

LLAMA_THREADS.description: CPU threads for llama.cpp non-GPU work.

HOST_RAM_GB.description: Unified system RAM in GB. macOS Apple Silicon only; the macOS env-generator writes it from sysctl hw.memsize and it is passed to llama.cpp for the Metal backend so it can size the unified-memory pool. Not written on Linux or Windows .env files. Not sensitive.

LLM_MODEL.description: Model name used by OpenClaw and dashboard

MODEL_RECOMMENDED_MODEL.description: Installer-selected full local model. This remains the hardware recommendation even while a bootstrap model is temporarily loaded.

MODEL_RECOMMENDED_GGUF.description: GGUF filename for the installer-selected full local model.

MODEL_RECOMMENDED_CONTEXT.description: Context window selected by the installer for the recommended full local model.

MODEL_RECOMMENDATION_SOURCE.description: Source of the installer model recommendation, for dashboard display and diagnostics.

MODEL_RECOMMENDATION_POLICY.description: Versioned policy used to select the recommended full local model before any model is downloaded.

MODEL_RECOMMENDATION_CONFIDENCE.description: Confidence level for the installer model recommendation.

MODEL_RECOMMENDATION_REASON.description: Human-readable explanation for why the installer selected the recommended model.

MODEL_RECOMMENDED_ALTERNATIVES.description: Semicolon-delimited top catalog alternatives from the pre-download selector, encoded as id:context:estimated_required_gb.

MODEL_PERFORMANCE_SOURCE.description: Initial performance source for the recommended model before local benchmarking.

MODEL_PERFORMANCE_LABEL.description: Initial dashboard performance label for the recommended model before local benchmarking.

MODEL_RUNTIME_PROFILE.description: Optional catalog runtime profile applied to the selected model.

MODEL_RUNTIME_PROFILE_LABEL.description: User-facing label for the applied model runtime profile.

MODEL_RUNTIME_PROFILE_SOURCE.description: Reference URL for the applied model runtime profile.

LLAMA_SERVER_IMAGE.description: Optional llama.cpp container image override for model families that require newer runtime support

LLAMA_SERVER_IMAGE_FALLBACK.description: Optional explicit fallback image if a custom llama.cpp image tag disappears or fails to pull.

LEMONADE_SERVER_IMAGE.description: Optional AMD Lemonade container image override. AMD Linux installs default to the image pinned in config/backends/amd.json.

WHISPER_IMAGE.description: Optional speaches/whisper image override. The default 0.9.0-rc.3-cuda tag is multi-arch (amd64 + arm64); set this only to pin a different speaches commit.

LLAMA_CPU_LIMIT.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU limit for llama-server

LLAMA_CPU_RESERVATION.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU reservation for llama-server

TTS_CPU_LIMIT.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU limit for Kokoro TTS

TTS_CPU_RESERVATION.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU reservation for Kokoro TTS

WHISPER_CPU_LIMIT.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU limit for Whisper STT

WHISPER_CPU_RESERVATION.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU reservation for Whisper STT

HERMES_CPU_LIMIT.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU limit for Hermes Agent

HERMES_CPU_RESERVATION.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU reservation for Hermes Agent

COMFYUI_CPU_LIMIT.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU limit for ComfyUI

COMFYUI_CPU_RESERVATION.description: Auto-capped Docker CPU reservation for ComfyUI

LLAMA_START_PERIOD.description: Healthcheck grace window for llama-server cold model load (Docker duration, e.g. 240s, 5m). Bump for 70B-class GGUFs on slow NVMe.

TIER.description: Hardware tier (1, 2, 3, 4, CLOUD, SH_COMPACT, SH_LARGE, NV_ULTRA)

PERPLEXICA_SCRAPE_URL_MAX_CHARS.description: Maximum characters kept per URL from Perplexica scrape_url before synthesis

TOKEN_SPY_URL.description: Internal URL for Token Spy service (overridable for non-default deployments)

TOKEN_SPY_API_KEY.description: API key shared by Token Spy and dashboard-api; generated by the installer, with existing Token Spy key files preserved on upgrade

DREAM_AGENT_KEY.description: API key for the Dream Host Agent (falls back to DASHBOARD_API_KEY if unset)

APE_API_KEY.description: API key for the APE (AI Proxy Engine) extension

SHIELD_API_KEY.description: API key for the Privacy Shield extension

WEBUI_NAME.description: Open WebUI display + PWA install name. Surfaces as page title, app header, and the label next to the icon when the user adds Dream to their phone home screen.

WEBUI_URL.description: Optional Open WebUI public URL used for share links, OAuth callbacks, and PWA install metadata. Leave empty for traditional localhost usage. Set to http://chat.<DREAM_DEVICE_NAME>.local after enabling dream-proxy + mDNS, or to a Tailscale Funnel / Cloudflare Tunnel / custom domain URL.

DREAM_DEVICE_NAME.description: Device name used by mDNS announcement and as the hostname segment for proxy/headless URLs. Letters / digits / hyphens only.

WHISPER_URL.description: Internal Whisper STT URL used by dashboard-api and Dream Talk. Leave empty for the bundled whisper service.

AUDIO_STT_OPENAI_API_BASE_URL.description: OpenAI-compatible speech-to-text base URL used by Open WebUI.

AUDIO_STT_OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for the Open WebUI speech-to-text backend.

AUDIO_STT_MODEL.description: Whisper STT model (HuggingFace repo ID). Auto-set by installer based on GPU backend: NVIDIA picks large-v3-turbo (faster, ~1.5GB), others pick base (~130MB). Edit in .env to override, then run `dream restart` (or reinstall).

TTS_URL.description: Internal Kokoro TTS URL used by dashboard-api and Dream Talk. Leave empty for the bundled tts service.

AUDIO_TTS_OPENAI_API_BASE_URL.description: OpenAI-compatible text-to-speech base URL used by Open WebUI.

AUDIO_TTS_OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for the Open WebUI text-to-speech backend.

AUDIO_TTS_MODEL.description: Open WebUI/Dream Talk text-to-speech model id.

AUDIO_TTS_VOICE.description: Open WebUI/Dream Talk Kokoro voice id.

N8N_AUTH.description: Deprecated: n8n v2.x has built-in user management. This variable is ignored.

N8N_WEBHOOK_URL.description: n8n webhook URL for external access

N8N_SECURE_COOKIE.description: n8n session-cookie policy. auto disables Secure only for loopback HTTP and enables it for HTTPS or non-loopback binds.

N8N_PROXY_HOPS.description: Number of trusted reverse proxies in front of n8n.

EMBEDDING_URL.description: Embedding service URL used by dashboard-api functional diagnostics. Leave empty for the bundled embeddings service.

VIDEO_GID.description: GID of the 'video' group on the host (used in container group_add for AMD GPU access)

RENDER_GID.description: GID of the 'render' group on the host (used in container group_add for AMD GPU access)

HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION.description: ROCm HSA gfx-target override (HSA-version format, e.g. '11.5.1' for gfx1151). Phase 06 sets this only when the detected gfx target is gfx1151 (Strix Halo, not in ROCm's native support list). Leave unset on natively-supported parts (gfx942/MI300X, gfx90a/MI250, gfx1100/RX 7900) — setting it on those crashes model-load with HSA_STATUS_ERROR_INVALID_ISA.

HSA_XNACK.description: AMD ROCm extended memory access for large KV caches

AMDGPU_TARGET.description: AMD gfx target used as a Docker build arg for the custom llama.cpp ROCm image (e.g. gfx1151, gfx942, gfx90a, gfx1100). Phase 06 auto-detects this from GPU_TOPOLOGY_JSON; override only if the detection is wrong.

LLAMA_CPP_REF.description: llama.cpp release tag to build (pin to avoid breakage)

ENABLE_WEB_SEARCH.description: Enable web search in Open WebUI

DIFY_SECRET_KEY.description: Dify secret key for API access

ENABLE_IMAGE_GENERATION.description: Enable image generation in Open WebUI (requires ComfyUI)

GPU_COUNT.description: Number of GPUs detected at install time

SYSTEM_RAM_GB.description: System RAM detected during install, used for model runtime profile matching inside containers.

LLAMA_SERVER_GPU_UUIDS.description: GPU UUIDs assigned to llama-server (comma-separated, used by NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES)

LLAMA_REASONING.description: llama.cpp reasoning/thinking mode: off (default) | auto | on. Off prevents thinking models from consuming the entire token budget on internal reasoning.

LLAMA_ARG_FLASH_ATTN.description: llama.cpp Flash Attention mode. Use 'on' for long-context performance tuning when the selected backend supports it.

LLAMA_ARG_CACHE_TYPE_K.description: llama.cpp KV cache key type. q8_0 reduces long-context memory pressure versus f16.

LLAMA_ARG_CACHE_TYPE_V.description: llama.cpp KV cache value type. q8_0 reduces long-context memory pressure versus f16.

LLAMA_ARG_N_CPU_MOE.description: Optional llama.cpp MoE tuning knob (--n-cpu-moe). Keeps the first N MoE expert layers on CPU/RAM. Leave unset for dense models.

LLAMA_SERVER_GPU_INDICES.description: GPU indices assigned to llama-server (comma-separated, used by ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES on AMD)

LLAMA_ARG_NO_CACHE_PROMPT.description: Optional llama.cpp boolean flag (--no-cache-prompt) used by specific long-context runtime profiles.

LLAMA_ARG_CHECKPOINT_EVERY_N_TOKENS.description: Optional llama.cpp long-context checkpoint interval. Some experimental profiles set -1 to disable checkpoints.

LLAMA_PARALLEL.description: llama.cpp --parallel request slots. Advanced 8GB MoE profiles keep this at 1 to preserve VRAM headroom.

LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_TYPE.description: Optional llama.cpp speculative decoding mode (--spec-type). Use only with a llama.cpp build and GGUF that explicitly support the selected mode, e.g. draft-mtp or ngram-mod,draft-mtp.

LLAMA_ARG_SPEC_DRAFT_N_MAX.description: Optional llama.cpp speculative draft token cap (--spec-draft-n-max). For current MTP-capable GGUFs this is commonly tuned by benchmark; leave unset for normal models.

LLAMA_ARG_SPLIT_MODE.description: llama.cpp split mode (LLAMA_ARG_SPLIT_MODE): none | layer (pipeline) | row (tensor/hybrid)

LLAMA_ARG_TENSOR_SPLIT.description: llama.cpp tensor split weights (LLAMA_ARG_TENSOR_SPLIT): comma-separated proportions e.g. 3,1

EMBEDDINGS_GPU_UUID.description: GPU UUID assigned to embeddings service (NVIDIA)

EMBEDDINGS_GPU_INDEX.description: GPU index for embeddings service (AMD, used as ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES)

COMFYUI_GPU_INDEX.description: GPU index for ComfyUI (AMD, used as ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES)

WHISPER_GPU_INDEX.description: GPU index for Whisper service (AMD, used as ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES)

ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES.description: AMD GPU indices visible to ROCm runtime (comma-separated, e.g. '0,1,2')

LEMONADE_LLAMACPP.description: Lemonade inner llama.cpp backend selector for AMD multi-GPU. Applied by docker-compose.multigpu-amd.yml. Lemonade's schema accepts only auto|vulkan|cpu; 'auto' plus LEMONADE_LLAMACPP_ROCM_BIN picks up the custom ROCm-built binary.

LEMONADE_LLAMACPP_ROCM_BIN.description: Path inside the llama-server container to a custom ROCm-built llama-server binary. Phase 06 sets this to /opt/llama-custom/llama-server only when the detected gfx target is gfx1151 (the custom binary is built with Strix-Halo-specific patches — MMQ tile size + AMDGPU_TARGET=gfx1151 — and either ISA-faults or runs perf-regressed on other architectures). Empty / unset → Lemonade uses its bundled ROCm-aware binary, which works for gfx942/MI300X and other natively-supported parts.

LLM_MODEL_SIZE_MB.description: Approximate model file size in MB (used for multi-GPU memory planning)

LITELLM_MASTER_KEY.description: LiteLLM master API key for proxy authentication

APE_RATE_LIMIT_RPM.description: APE per-minute policy check rate limit.

APE_STRICT_MODE.description: When true, APE blocks policy violations instead of only logging advisory decisions.

OPENCLAW_LLM_URL.description: Optional OpenClaw provider base URL override, mainly for routing OpenClaw traffic through monitoring/proxy layers.

OPENCLAW_HTTP_API.description: Opt-in OpenClaw OpenAI-compatible HTTP shim. Leave empty unless you are deliberately exposing the shim for advanced integrations.

DREAM_AGENT_BIND.description: Bind address for the Dream Host Agent HTTP server. Defaults to 127.0.0.1 on macOS/Windows, dream-network gateway IP on Linux, then Docker bridge gateway, then 127.0.0.1.

DREAM_AGENT_PORT.description: Host Agent HTTP port used by dashboard-api to request privileged host operations such as .env writes and service recreation.

DREAM_AGENT_HOST.description: Hostname or IP that dashboard-api containers use to reach the Dream Host Agent. Docker Desktop installs set this to host.docker.internal so loopback-only host-agent binds remain reachable from containers.

DREAM_TIER.description: Hardware tier classification (0-4, SH_LARGE, SH_COMPACT, NV_ULTRA, CLOUD)

HW_CLASS.description: Hardware class identifier from capability profile

DREAM_SESSION_SECRET.description: HMAC signing secret for the dream-session cookie. dashboard-api uses this to sign at magic-link redemption; the Hermes auth-proxy uses /api/auth/verify-session to validate. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`. Rotating kicks all current sessions.

DREAM_PUBLIC_URL.description: Public base URL used by dashboard-api when generating invite and magic-link URLs for custom domains, tunnels, or Tailscale Funnel. Leave empty for normal mDNS/LAN URL generation.

DREAM_COOKIE_DOMAIN.description: Cookie domain for dream-session SSO across dashboard/chat/auth/hermes subdomains. Empty keeps cookies host-only; proxy installs commonly use <device>.local.

DREAM_PROXY_PORT.description: Host port for the Dream Server reverse proxy (Caddy). Default 80 — standard HTTP. The proxy is opt-in via `dream enable dream-proxy`.

DREAM_PROXY_TLS_PORT.description: Host port for HTTPS (deferred; HTTP only in v1). Default 443.

DREAM_PROXY_BIND.description: Bind address for the reverse proxy's host port. Defaults to 0.0.0.0 (LAN-exposed) — that's the whole point of the proxy. Override to 127.0.0.1 to keep it localhost-only.

HERMES_LLM_BASE_URL.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint Hermes Agent talks to. Defaults to Dream Server's llama-server.

HERMES_LLM_API_KEY.description: Dummy API key for Hermes Agent's OpenAI SDK (llama-server doesn't validate it, but the SDK requires the field to be non-empty).

HERMES_AGENT_IMAGE.description: Container image used for Hermes Agent. Defaults to a reviewed upstream version tag; override only for deliberate hotfix testing.

HERMES_AGENT_IMAGE_FALLBACK.description: Optional explicit fallback Hermes Agent image. Phase 08 uses it only if HERMES_AGENT_IMAGE cannot be resolved.

HERMES_LANGUAGE.description: UI language for Hermes Agent's web dashboard (defaults to en).

SEARXNG_URL.description: SearXNG URL used by Hermes web tools. Defaults to the bundled searxng service on the Docker network.

WHATSAPP_ENABLED.description: Enable Hermes's optional WhatsApp gateway integration. Disabled by default.

WHATSAPP_ALLOWED_USERS.description: Comma-separated WhatsApp user IDs or phone numbers allowed to talk to Hermes.

WHATSAPP_REQUIRE_MENTION.description: Require a mention/prefix before Hermes replies in WhatsApp chats.

WHATSAPP_FREE_RESPONSE_CHATS.description: Comma-separated WhatsApp chat IDs where Hermes may respond without an explicit mention.

WHATSAPP_REPLY_PREFIX.description: Optional prefix added to Hermes WhatsApp replies.

HERMES_PROXY_PORT.description: External port for the Hermes auth-proxy (Caddy sidecar that gates LAN access by verifying the dream-session cookie via dashboard-api's /api/auth/verify-session endpoint).

HERMES_PROXY_UPSTREAM.description: Internal upstream the Hermes auth-proxy forwards to. Defaults to dream-hermes:9119.

DREAM_AUTH_UPSTREAM.description: Where Caddy forward_auth sends its session-verify sub-request. Defaults to the in-network dashboard-api container; override if dashboard-api lives elsewhere.

HERMES_PROXY_AUTH_DOCS_URL.description: Optional docs/help URL shown on the Hermes auth-required page when a visitor lacks a valid dream-session cookie.

TS_AUTHKEY.description: Tailscale auth key (tskey-auth-...). Generate at https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/keys. Consumed once on first join; the daemon caches the node key in data/tailscale/.

TS_HOSTNAME.description: Hostname this device registers as on the Tailscale net. Defaults to DREAM_DEVICE_NAME. Reachable as <hostname>.<tailnet>.ts.net once joined.

TS_EXTRA_ARGS.description: Optional extra flags passed to `tailscale up`, such as --advertise-tags=tag:dream after your tailnet ACL defines and authorizes that tag.
